RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0008 Page 2 of 2 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 02/06/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 639 - 2,448 06/10/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 2,448 13/01/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 299 371 2,520 15/03/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 231 1,561 3,850 16/10/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 3,850 02/07/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 516 - 3,334 17/03/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 2,029 5,363 24/04/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 1,141 6,504 12/06/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 194 - 6,310 20/05/2025 UTILITY BILL 130 801 6,981 13/07/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - 80 7,061 24/03/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 177 1,547 8,431 19/03/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 2,165 10,596 18/10/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 64 976 11,508 25/02/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 333 - 11,175 07/01/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 421 - 10,754 07/09/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 488 688 10,954 01/12/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 843 11,797
